entities.description: libmosquitto is a software library used to implement mqtt protocol versions 5 0 and 3 1 1 for communication with mqtt brokers
mqtt is a messaging protocol used for communication between devices  specifically mentioned in the context of version 5 0 3 1 1
mqtt      is a server that facilitates communication between devices using the mqtt protocol
web   is a web interface used by the upper computer to receive and display data from an mqtt server

relations.description: the evaluation board uses the libmosquitto library to communicate with the mqtt broker
the evaluation board sends sine wave data to the mqtt broker server
the upper computer uses a web interface to receive and display data from the mqtt server
the evaluation board generates sine wave data that is sent to the mqtt server
